title: glib2 bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[2.80.4-7]
- gdbusconnection: Prevent sending a serial of zero on overflow

[2.80.4-6]
- Add patches for CVE-2024-52533 and CVE-2025-4373

[2.80.4-5]
- metadata preparation for RHIVOS RHELMISC-7537
full_text:
